name: Tini's Famous Mac and Cheese
description: A three-cheese baked mac and cheese ("cheese with noods") made with cavatappi and a creamy stovetop cheese sauce.
ingredients: 16 ounces of Colby jack cheese, grated
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
Cook cavatappi per package directions, drain and set aside.
Combine all three shredded cheeses; divide half into another bowl.
Mix garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper; divide in half.
Melt butter, add half the seasoning and flour to form a paste; whisk in evaporated milk, heavy cream, remaining seasoning, and mustard until thick; slowly add half the cheese.
Stir pasta into cheese sauce until coated.
Layer pasta and remaining cheese alternately in the baking dish.
